features: Food-grade Plastic: Soy sauce bowl is made from high-quality, non-toxic plastic, ensuring it is completely safe for direct contact with food. Small dipping bowls's shatter-resistant design makes it an ideal choice for daily use, family gatherings, or parties. The smooth matte black surface adds a touch of elegance while also featuring stain-resistant and odour-resistant properties.

Easy to Clean: Black dipping bowls's smooth matte texture prevents food residue from sticking, making these bowls extremely easy to clean—simply rinse or wipe after use. small round dish's stylish black coating seamlessly integrates with any table setting, enhancing the overall aesthetic of your kitchen or dining space.

Non-slip Base & Stable and Practical: Designed for convenience, small dipping bowls feature a wide opening for easy scooping, along with a stable non-slip base to prevent spills even on slippery surfaces. The smooth bottom of triple sauce bowl ensures that it stays firmly in place, allowing you to safely serve sauces and condiments during meals.

Stackable & Space-Saving: Soy sauce bowl for snacks measures just 8.7 × 2.5 cm, making it the perfect choice for condiments, dips, and small portions of food. The stackable design of mini tempered glass bowls saves valuable kitchen space, making it ideal for small apartments, RVs, or crowded countertops. Note: Not suitable for microwaves, ovens, or sterilizers.

Versatile Uses: 6-piece finger bowls set is perfect for holding dips, sauces, salad dressings, nuts, olives, ice cream, and appetisers, making it an essential item for any kitchen or dining table. Whether hosting a barbecue party, dinner gathering, or simply enjoying snacks, mini snack bowl performs exceptionally well.
